description: Pi can keep a stale local clone of a git-installed package under ~/.pi/agent/git/... even when the source repo and GitHub are up to date, which can make slash commands appear missing after /reload.
resolution: Refresh or reinstall the git package itself (for example with pi update --extensions or remove/install), because /reload only reloads the already installed local package copy and does not pull new commits from GitHub.

name: Draft workflow is session-end driven
description: In pi-mulch, /mulch-review and /mulch-apply only work after a draft file exists under .mulch/drafts. Drafts are generated on session shutdown (not /reload) when draftMode is session-end, Mulch is ready, files were touched in-session, and the latest post-turn-linter status is clean.
